title: SCAORA elections: Polling today with 58 candidates contesting
description: Elections to the Supreme Court Advocates-on-Record Association (SCAORA) will be held today.The elections are being conducted by the SCAORA Election Committee. A total of 58 candidates are contesting the elections across various posts.Contestants across major posts, including President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer, Joint Secretary, Joint Treasurer and Member Executive are as follows:PresidentDevvratShivaji M JadhavVice PresidentNikhil JainPuneet Singh BindraPurushottam Sharma TripathiMd
